title: Der Herr Kanzleirat
overview: Leopold Bachmayer, a court judge in Vienna, is a grumpy bachelor. Doing foolish things for the sake of a woman could never happen to him. He is firmly convinced of this. This changes abruptly when, shortly before his vacation, he has to interrogate the seductive Frau von Seewald about a brooch allegedly stolen by a maid.

trailers.title: Der Herr Kanzleirat - MOSER, HANS / KRAUS, FRED / CARL, RUDOLF (2012)
